div.p: Input: Unordered list of Expression objects from WHERE clause. Process:

ol.li: Lexical Normalization: Canonicalize (A > B) and (B < A).
Map Reductions: Group predicates by ColumnReference.

Range Merging:
Intersection ∩ for overlapping constraints.
Identity Check for exact duplicates.
Boundary Analysis for subsumption.
Contradiction: If ∩ results in ∅, replace subtree with FalseConstant.

g.text: Time: O(N log N) | Space: O(N)
Component: SQL Query Optimizer | Phase: Logical Transformation (Algebraic Simplification)

div.p: Subset Check I₁ ⊂ I₂ Result: I₂ is redundant
